notes: stock Git accepts index version major 0 and writes a readable pack
stock Git accepts index version major 0 with a numeric minor value
stock Git accepts index version major 1 with a numeric minor value
stock Git accepts index version major 2 with a numeric minor value
stock Git rejects unsupported numeric index version major 3 with exit 128
stock Git rejects unsupported numeric index version major 3 even with a numeric minor value
stock Git rejects non-numeric index version values as bad index versions with exit 128
stock Git rejects non-numeric minor index version values as bad index versions with exit 128
stock Git rejects non-numeric minor index version values for major 1 as bad index versions with exit 128
stock Git rejects unsupported negative numeric index version majors with exit 128
stdout pack output unpacks into stock-readable objects matching the source repository
progress flag writes a stock-readable pack with matching object contents
no-progress flag writes a stock-readable pack with matching object contents
no-reuse-delta writes a stock-readable pack with matching object contents
no-reuse-object writes a stock-readable pack with matching object contents
delta-base-offset writes a stock-readable pack with matching object contents
window and depth options write a stock-readable delta pack verified by stock Git
basename mode writes stock-readable pack and index files with all expected objects
